intro: Antidaphne schottii, also known as Schotia, is a medicinal plant belonging to the family Polygalaceae, native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Antidaphne schottii include flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
